description: MediFlow Sample Medical Records / Clinical Notes

records.diagnosis: Hypertensive Heart Failure Stage II — Acute Exacerbation
records.symptoms: Chest pain, severe breathlessness, dizziness, BP 160/100, SpO2 94%
records.notes: Patient admitted to ICU. Oxygen support started. Furosemide 40mg IV given. Lisinopril dose increased from 5mg to 10mg. Echo shows EF 48%. Cardiology team review done. Monitoring 6-hourly vitals.

records.symptoms: Mild breathlessness on exertion, BP 138/85, slight ankle edema
records.notes: Patient improving on current medications. Continue Lisinopril 5mg + Atenolol 25mg. Low-sodium diet counselling given. Daily BP monitoring advised. Return if BP > 150/95.

records.symptoms: Chest pain, breathlessness on exertion, ankle swelling, BP 150/95, HR 92 bpm
records.notes: New diagnosis of Hypertensive Heart Failure. Started Lisinopril 5mg + Atenolol 25mg. Ordered Echo 2D, Holter monitoring, KFT, CBC. Patient counselled regarding diet and lifestyle. Follow-up in 2 weeks.

records.diagnosis: Post Total Knee Replacement — Recovery Phase
records.symptoms: Mild swelling around surgical site, controlled pain (3/10), improving mobility
records.notes: Post-op day 14. Wound healing well, no signs of infection. Physiotherapy progressing — patient can walk with support. Continue physiotherapy 5x/week. Pain managed with Tab. Tramadol 50mg SOS. Review X-Ray knee in 2 weeks.
